title: Belt Bundles [Backslot Mod Texturepack]
description: A Texturepack Made for Medecoole's Backslot Mod to make bundles on the belt!
body:
# Belt Bundles
Belt bundles is a very simple texturepack meant as an example for making texturepacks\
for Medecoole's [Backslot Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/backslot-mod).\
It does not change the model or texture of the default bundles as it only changes the location of bundles when in the back slot!

![Preview image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c2193ab4594bc090e73a08083c2ccf9b7fe41f0_0.webp)

(see [Backslot Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/backslot-mod)'s Description for more info)
